screenshots.howReached: Started a rogue run, descended once, and staged a level-4 spell-study draft.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Shows spell acquisition pacing, taxonomy, and how much mechanical meaning the draft cards carry.

screenshots.howReached: Opened the live magic hub with a utility-heavy mixed spellbook and Light selected.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Shows how clearly the spell system communicates role, targeting, and long-term usefulness.

screenshots.howReached: Opened the live spell tray with Light selected.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Shows the in-run casting summary and whether field-facing spell language supports fast tactical use.

stagingNotes: Spell Study is staged on a level-4 rogue so the draft includes a mix of newly unlocked and previously skipped utility and control spells.
Magic Book and Field Tray are staged with a utility-heavy mixed book so spell descriptions, role labels, and targeting language are visible in one frame.
The same script is run before and after the spell-focused improvements.
